documentName: Daily Inspection Record of Automatic Cutting and Crimping Machine TRD411F-α

children.text: Daily Inspection Record of Automatic Cutting and Crimping Machine TRD411F-α
※ Machine Number = Serial number of the equipment manufacturer. Equipment Number = Control number set by FAS.

※ In case an NG was found, production associate should report to the production junior staff, staff or supervisor. Then equipment member will do the repair and perform a special inspection. After the repair and special inspection has been completed by the equipment member, production junior staff should correct the X with a double dash and put circle in it. Lastly, production junior staff will affix her signature as a confirmation.

※ A Production Associate shall input Next Pm Date of inspecton on the daily checksheet regarding the status of the inspection sticker. Then on the “Next PM Date Confirmation”, encircle “OK” if it is not yet expired and “NG” if it is expired to be reported to Production Jr. Staff. After the inspection sticker is updated a Jr. staff shall put slash on “NG” with counter sign and encircle the “OK”.
Describing Symbols:    ◯ ＝ Normal/OK    △ ＝ Adjust/Clean    ✕ ＝ NG    ／ ＝ Not Applicable
*1. Checking of Safety Items and Importantly Needed Tools:
a) Checking the Emergency Stop Button. (Functional & Working).
b) Up/Down Safety Cover must be Functional & Working.
c). Slide Cutter Plate. (In Good Condition)
d). Guide Plate. [Available, In Good Condition, No Damage]
e). Industrial Cutter. [Available, In Good Condition, No Damage]
f). String Cutter. [Available, In Good Condition, No Damage]
2.3. (F Clamp, R Clamp, Measuring belt side). F Clamp, R Clamp: 0.40 ±0. 05 [MPa] Measuring Belt: 0.30 ±0.05 [MPa]

3. Confirmation of QA Sensor ① Strip Length Regular Condition Record

NG Judgement due to poor crimping
